label: Complex threat
description: A weighted threat entry for a ComplexLayoutDef. The element name is the ComplexThreatDef defName; scalar text is the selection weight.

def.label: Threat def
def.description: ComplexThreatDef defName. Populated from the XML element name by the keyedObjectList loader.

selectionWeight.label: Selection weight
selectionWeight.description: Relative selection weight for this threat. May also be provided as a scalar text node on the element.

chancePerComplex.label: Chance per complex
chancePerComplex.description: Probability this threat is selected per complex layout.

maxPerComplex.label: Max per complex
maxPerComplex.description: Maximum instances of this threat per complex layout. Omit for uncapped.

maxPerRoom.label: Max per room
maxPerRoom.description: Maximum instances of this threat per room.
